m1_banker.name: Banker
m1_banker.blurb: Floor-heavy. Consistency, average points, SB track record. Premium picks on favored fixtures. The default top-decile path on average rounds.

m2_form_hunter.name: Form Hunter
m2_form_hunter.blurb: Recency-weighted. Recent goals, started-pct, fotmob rating, last-round explosions. Punishes cold streaks even on strong fixtures.

m3_stat_max.name: Stat Maximizer
m3_stat_max.blurb: Pure FIFA-stats. Powerrank + position-routed per-90 + creativity + duels. Ignores ownership entirely — picks the best player regardless of crowd.

m4_sb_hunter.name: SB Hunter
m4_sb_hunter.blurb: K's rule. 12 sub-5% picks for the +2 Scouting Bonus event + 3 anchors: 2 sure-shot FWDs (xG × goals_index) + 1 most-influential MID (creativity + B2). Highest variance, highest rank-leap upside.
